talk.title: CLAUDE.md Goes Live: Testing the 65 → 94% Accuracy Claim
talk.abstract: Karpathy's 4 rules went viral. 82,000 stars. The claim: coding accuracy jumps from 65% to 94% with a single plain-text file. ThaiHN ran the actual experiment — real tasks, real metrics — and is here to show the raw results, what actually moved the needle, and how to squeeze even more out of it.
